name: DesktopCommanderMCP
description: This is MCP server for Claude that gives it terminal control, file system search and diff file editing capabilities
readme_excerpt: Work with code and text, run processes, and automate tasks, going far beyond other AI editors - while using host client subscriptions instead of API token costs.

name: meetily
description: Privacy first, AI meeting assistant with 4x faster Parakeet/Whisper live transcription, speaker diarization, and Ollama summarization built on Rust. 100% local processing. no cloud required. Meetily (Meetly Ai - https://meetily.ai) is the #1 Self-hosted, Open-source Ai meeting note taker for macOS & Windows. Understand How to write meeting minutes

name: bun
description: Incredibly fast JavaScript runtime, bundler, test runner, and package manager – all in one
readme_excerpt: Bun is an all-in-one toolkit for JavaScript and TypeScript apps. It ships as a single executable called bun.

name: system_prompts_leaks
description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT GPT-5.6, Codex GPT-5.6, GPT-5.5. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
readme_excerpt: The purpose of this repo is to document the System Prompt instructions for all the AI chatbots out there - Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini etc.

name: abseil-cpp
readme_excerpt: The repository contains the Abseil C++ library code. Abseil is an open-source collection of C++ code (compliant to C++17) designed to augment the C++ standard library.

name: strix
description: Open-source AI penetration testing tool to find and fix your app’s vulnerabilities.
readme_excerpt: Strix are autonomous AI penetration testing agents that act just like real hackers - they run your code dynamically, find vulnerabilities, and validate them through actual proofs-of-concept. Built for developers and security teams who need fast, accurate security testing without the overhead of manual pentesting or the false positives of static analysis tools.

name: agent-skills
description: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.
readme_excerpt: **Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.**

name: codex-plugin-cc
description: Use Codex from Claude Code to review code or delegate tasks.
readme_excerpt: Use Codex from inside Claude Code for code reviews or to delegate tasks to Codex.

name: yaml-cpp
description: A YAML parser and emitter in C++
readme_excerpt: yaml-cpp is a YAML parser and emitter in C++ matching the YAML 1.2 spec.

name: herdr
description: agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal.

name: skills
description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.
readme_excerpt: My agent skills that I use every day to do real engineering - not vibe coding.

name: claude-video
description: Give Claude the ability to watch any video. /watch downloads, extracts frames, transcribes, hands it all to Claude.

name: superpowers
description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
readme_excerpt: Superpowers is a complete software development methodology for your coding agents, built on top of a set of composable skills and some initial instructions that make sure your agent uses them.

name: astryx
description: An open source design system that's fully customizable and agent ready
readme_excerpt: An open source design system that's fully customizable and built for how we build now — by people and the agents working alongside them.

name: TypeScript
description: TypeScript is a superset of JavaScript that compiles to clean JavaScript output.
readme_excerpt: TypeScript is a language for application-scale JavaScript. TypeScript adds optional types to JavaScript that support tools for large-scale JavaScript applications for any browser, for any host, on any OS. TypeScript compiles to readable, standards-based JavaScript. Try it out at the playground, and stay up to date via our blog and Twitter account.

name: page-agent
description: JavaScript in-page GUI agent. Control web interfaces with natural language.
readme_excerpt: The GUI Agent Living in Your Webpage. One script gives any web page its own AI agent.

name: Catch2
description: A modern, C++-native, test framework for unit-tests, TDD and BDD - using C++14, C++17 and later (C++11 support is in v2.x branch, and C++03 on the Catch1.x branch)
readme_excerpt: Catch2 is mainly a unit testing framework for C++, but it also provides basic micro-benchmarking features, and simple BDD macros.

name: CubeSandbox
description: Instant, Concurrent, Secure & Lightweight Sandbox for AI Agents.
readme_excerpt: Cube Sandbox is a high-performance, out-of-the-box secure sandbox service built on RustVMM and KVM. It supports both single-node deployment and easy scaling to multi-node clusters. It is compatible with the E2B SDK and can create a hardware-isolated, fully serviceable sandbox in under 60ms with less than 5MB of memory overhead.
